# Seankrix Technologies - Complete AI Knowledge File

Version: 1.0
Last Updated: 2026-07-09

Website:
https://seankrixtechnologies.com

Company:
Seankrix Technologies

Tagline:
Innovating Beyond Limits

Description:
Seankrix Technologies is an India-based software development company specializing in custom website development, web applications, mobile app development, eCommerce solutions, UI/UX design, SEO optimization, cloud solutions, AI-powered software, CRM systems, ERP systems, and business automation.

Mission:
To help startups, small businesses, and enterprises build fast, scalable, secure, and SEO-friendly digital products using modern technologies.

Primary Services

- Custom Website Development
- Business Website Development
- Corporate Website Development
- eCommerce Website Development
- Custom Web Application Development
- Mobile App Development
- UI/UX Design
- SEO Optimization
- Cloud Solutions
- API Integration
- CRM Development
- ERP Development
- AI Business Solutions
- Software Development
- Website Maintenance
- Website Redesign

Frontend
- React.js

- TypeScript

- Tailwind CSS

- NestJS
- Laravel
- PHP

- MongoDB

- PostgreSQL

- Vercel

- Figma
